pages.text: A mesa isle. Red sand over a striped body of $(item)terracotta$() — orange, yellow, white, gray, red, and brown bands cross its cliffs.
$(bold)Looks$()$(br)Mesa (red sand), eroded (terracotta top), and wooded (a green, dark-oak-topped plateau) variants.
$(bold)Gold$()$(br)Badlands run rich with $(item)gold$(), as in the vanilla mesa, with a little redstone besides.
